Tests the behavior of Math.ceil with Infinity in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.ceil` function when applied to `Infinity`. It verifies that the result of `Math.ceil(Infinity)` is equal to `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY`. This test ensures that the `Math.ceil` function correctly handles the special case of positive infinity, which is a part of JavaScript's standard mathematical operations. The code is a single-line script that serves a narrow purpose, focusing on validating a specific mathematical operation.
